item.title: ICE abduction - DR OFFICE - NO WARRANT / NO ID
item.description: Why are you letting this happen? You outnumber them. https://imgur.com/gallery/ice-runs-over-civilians-to-kidnap-masked-no-judicial-warrant-wSh4dAY It's not going to stop. It will continue to get worse. Their budget has been increased more than the entire Russian Military. Get organized.

item.dc:creator: flowingstreim

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Paperface
item.description: Today's Tiabeanie Tax; Bean sleeping on one of Dad's shirts. She always wants to sleep near me or near stuff that smells like me. Today's comic is early, but the next little while is going to be really rough for us on this side. A lot of things have gone drastically wrong this last week and things are looking a bit grim. Bean is healthy and okay, so don't worry about her, she just doesn't get any wet food for a while. It's the humans I have far more concern for. If my posts are late, or missing for a day or two, it's because life hasn't let me have a break yet. Edit: Thanks to the insane generosity of ParallelParkingInABurka (send them all your love and thanks!), tomorrow I'll be posting a bit of extra cat-tax. I'm going to spend the day trying to get a picture of my roommate's very elusive kitty
item.dc:creator: TheUnnamedPoet

item.title: Just a great barber
item.description: Francisco Oliveira is a talented barber who dedicates his craft to creating wigs for individuals facing hair loss, with a special focus on children. His work goes beyond hairstyling, turning into a form of art that restores confidence and brings joy to those affected by medical conditions.
item.dc:creator: ILBaztardo

item.title: Prelude to Epstein, who replaced Cohn and the corruption of the RNC.
item.description:
Cohn Prosecutor in the Rosenberg Trial in which the Rosenberg's were convicted of espionage and killed. Trump's first major mentor and right-hand lawyer. Cohn died of Aid's and was replaced by Epstein as someone who could provide sex trafficking.
Trump and Cohn
Manafort, Black and Stone law firm. Also known as the torture lobby for representing despots to garner favors and pardons from the USA. Manafort on left later became Trump's campaign manager. Stone in the middle worked with Nixon and famously has a full tattoo on his back of Nixon.
A young Stone and Trump
An idea of how much the rules have changed. This is primarily due to McConnell blocking Obama's SCOTUS nominees and Obama putting up with it. He did not have to but he did which means he is complicit.
Once republics discovered that the public would not support their agendas, they did not abandon their ideas to save democracy. They abandoned democracy to implement their ideas and corrupted the US government to the point where SCOTUS has 5 republican judges who protect the agenda of what is now, fascism.
item.dc:creator: Jackscat

item.title: I lost the love of my life this morning.
item.description: We went to see In Flames together in May. She was so excited to experience one of my favorite bands. She understood me better than anyone, knew all my quirks and problems and still loved me. Could make friends wherever she went. A closet extrovert that brought joy to so many people. I have access to grief counseling and any mental health. I miss her so much.. watching my cats wait by the door for her is heartbreaking.. Liana, I will love you always.
item.dc:creator: nezo

item.title: More floods - DOGE cuts Weather Services

item.title: I Etch A Sketched in Myrtle Beach! Here's how it went
item.description:
On June 26th I went on a quick trip to Myrtle Beach to make some fun Etch A Sketch portraits for Ripley's Believe it or Not! Guests had an opportunity to walk away with a fun souvenir photo, and I had an opportunity to meet tourists and locals from all over the US. Call me Ruby Rhod, because the weather was hot, hot, HOT! Thankfully I was probably a reptile in a former life so it wasn't so bad, and Ripley's was great about keeping an ongoing supply of ice cold bottled waters.
While at work I rarely have a chance to snap photos of happy guests with their finished art, so I had to be quick when I snapped this shot! Margie and the rest of the team at Ripley's Myrtle Beach were great.
For this trip I offered my "Quick Pics" option, which is where I draw a guest's portrait in around 5 minutes, then hand off the drawing to my friend Grace who snaps a photo of the finished art and puts it into this nifty template Ripley's and I collaboratively designed for the experience. I also offer permanent Etch A Sketch portraits where I remove all that pesky excess aluminum powder in advance!
I heard rumors about this fabled ElectroSketch, so I had to pay my respects with the correct amount of Wonder and Awe. This is my 2001 obelisk. Yes I asked them how I can get one.
I am THRILLED to say that the ElectroSketch works like a DREAM. I was half expecting it to feel off, but they really outdid themselves on capturing the Etch A Sketch feel. I'm blown away and want 12 please!
Obligatory Back to the Future photo op! It's in my top 3 films (the other 2 being The Big Lebowski and The Sound of Music) so I was quite pleased to hop on the hoverboard. I was hoping to share a buncha video footage from this trip, but I'm actually about to head back on the road again for Ripley's in Gatlinburg! You can catch me this Friday from 11am-3pm at the Ripley's Aquarium, or 11am-4pm on Saturday (Etch A Sketch day!!!) at the Believe it or Not! location! Also also! Last but not least - while I have you here, if you still do that whole normal TV thing, catch my Etch A Sketch art LIVE on the Today Show this Saturday! I've been told that 3 special portraits I etched should be airing around 8:30am ET (barring any breaking news). I look forward to sharing more footage from this amazing experience - you may not have spotted it the first time, but next to the ElectroSketch is a little monitor that plays a video about ME! Which means I'm in a museum baby!!! Wishing you all a Happy Etch A Sketch Day this Saturday, and I hope to meet a few of you in Gatlinburg!
item.dc:creator: pikajane
